lines: India versus Pakistan. Technology and internet race. Who wins?
Start with internet users. India has hundreds of millions more people online.
Smartphone penetration and total app market size also heavily favor India.
IT exports are where the difference becomes dramatic. India is a global giant. Pakistan is still far smaller.
Startup scale and venture funding also point strongly toward India.
Digital payments are another major advantage. India built one of the biggest instant payment systems on Earth.
Pakistan is growing fast online, but it is still playing catch-up in size and capital.
So if the contest is modern tech scale, India wins clearly.
Pakistan has momentum. India has the ecosystem.

seo.title: India vs Pakistan — Internet & Tech Race 📱
seo.description:
India vs Pakistan tech comparison: internet users, IT exports, startups, digital payments, and smartphone scale.
